questionHtml:
Three samples of the same liquid are mixed in an insulated container. The masses and initial temperatures of the samples are:

What is the equilibrium temperature of the mixture?


A.  45 °C

B.  36 °C

C.  30 °C

D.  24 °C

meta.title: Three samples of the same liquid are mixed in an insulated container. The masses and initial temperatures of the samples are: What is the equilibrium temperature of the mixture? A.
